mapper.insert: INSERT INTO breed_recom (recomno, recom, breedno, memberno) VALUES (breed_recom_seq.nextval, 1, #{breedno}, #{memberno})
mapper.select: SELECT recomno, recom, breedno, memberno FROM breed_recom WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY recomno DESC
SELECT recomno, recom, breedno, memberno FROM breed_recom WHERE breedno = #{breedno} ORDER BY recomno DESC
